items.title: Fresh Lists Home
items.description: The lists screen now has a warmer grocery-focused palette, a compact dashboard summary, and clearer create-list actions.

items.title: Modern List Cards
items.description: List cards now use stronger hierarchy, rounded progress bars, and clearer sharing status chips.

items.title: Polished List Details
items.description: List detail pages now have richer headers, cleaner progress treatment, and better member status presentation.

items.title: Cleaner Item Editing
items.description: Adding and checking off items now feels more compact and refined with filled fields, circular checks, and clearer item rows.
